failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch call was malformed because it omitted the required string field product_type.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user requested a ProductCatalogSearch for available Electric Kettles with capacity 1.5L and price greater than 147.46. The required product_type value, "Electric Kettle", was available from the user request and Coordinator plan. The Researcher/Tool invocation omitted product_type, and the tool explicitly returned a SchemaError saying catalog.search requires a string product_type. This was not resolved later; the Executor only reported inability to complete the task and the Evaluator rejected the answer.
